title: Better Leaves
body:
[![Swills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModderZellior/Image/main/bannerofswills.jpg)](https://swills.gg/?ref=ZELLIOR)

**Better Leaves**

Makes traveling through forests much easier.

**Features**
- When sneaking, you can walk through leaves.
- Mounts can go through leaves.
- When on top of leaves, you cannot go through, even when you sneak. Counts for mounts as well.

**Warning**
- Leaves do **not** negate fall damage even when sneaking.
  
**Requirements**
- Fabric API
